textPlain: While I am using cockpit every time I need to remotely manage the machines, I couldn't get it to log me in via something other than user's login/password, which are not that safe, and it listens to 0.0.0.0 by default too.So I have to ssh into machine, start cockpit service, use it, and then stop the cockpit.socket once I finish.Would be great to have something which has its own users/passwords (to have strong password in bitwarden) and doesn't listen to 0.0.0.0 by default. If it's also lightweight – even better!
I thought cockpit use pam, so you can use other pam modules to log in.
